signals.headline: Elon Musk #Tweets April 24-May 1 Market Leads X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**

Elon Musk #Tweets April 24-May 1 Market Leads X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket traders on X are buzzing about the newly launched "Elon Musk # tweets April 24 - May 1, 2026?" market (launched Apr 21), with $638.5K volume and leading outcomes "240-259" at 18% and "220-239" at 14%, reflecting his recent 25-35 tweets/day pace (e.g., 270 posts Apr 10-17).[1]
